items.claim: Islam Makhachev is capable of winning the middleweight title if he chooses to pursue it.
items.quote: if Hamza's not there, and Islam wants to go crazy for a year, he could win that title, too.

items.claim: Shavkat Rakhmonov is a problem for opponents when he competes.
items.quote: when we see him fight, he is a problem.

items.claim: Ciryl Gane will defeat Tom Aspinall in their scheduled fight.
items.quote: when they schedule that fight, I really think Ciryl Gane's going to win.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez has a significant reach advantage over Cody Garbrandt.
items.quote: Yanez 4 inch reach advantage. That's considerable.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez is significantly more active in striking volume than Cody Garbrandt.
items.quote: Yanez six significant strikes per minute to 2.8 for Garbrandt.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez will defeat Cody Garbrandt by decision.
items.quote: I like Yanez to get the job done by decision

items.claim: Robert Whittaker will be undersized against Nikita Krylov due to the height difference.
items.quote: he's still going to be undersized potentially in this fight, especially when you look at 6'3" versus 6'0".

items.claim: Robert Whittaker will be rejuvenated and stronger moving up to light heavyweight.
items.quote: I think Whittaker's going to be rejuvenated. You've seen this happen to a lot of fighters. They go up and they win a few fights

items.claim: Robert Whittaker will have a speed advantage over Nikita Krylov.
items.quote: he'll have more speed than Krylov, I believe.
